kata — keybindings

Global
?         help
q/ctrl+c  quit
P         projects
L         toggle layout

Graph
k/up    up
j/down  down
pgup    page up
pgdown  page down
g       first
G       last
enter   open detail
space   expand/collapse
n       new issue (form)
o       toggle graph order
x       close
r       reopen

Detail
tab            next tab
shift+tab      prev tab
enter          jump to referenced issue
esc/backspace  back
e              edit body
c              new comment
p              set parent
b              add blocker
l              add link
+              add label
-              remove label
a              assign owner
A              clear owner

Children
N      new child
↑↓     move child cursor
enter  open child

Forms
ctrl+s         save or apply
esc            cancel
tab/shift+tab  change field
ctrl+e         open editor
ctrl+u         clear prompt

Filters
/       search
s       cycle status filter
f       filter (form)
c       clear filters
ctrl+r  reset filter form

press ? to return
